summary: Bulk Scope Feature - All backend tests PASSED (14/14). Frontend ManageOptionsModal Bulk Scope feature verified working. Feature allows admins to select multiple specs/filters at once and assign them all to a product group in one click.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: POST /api/specifications/types/bulk-assign-group - bulk-assigns product group to multiple spec types
VERIFIED: POST /api/specifications/types/bulk-assign-group - bulk-removes product group from multiple spec types
VERIFIED: POST /api/specifications/types/bulk-assign-group - returns 400 when type_ids or product_group missing
VERIFIED: POST /api/filters/types/bulk-assign-group - bulk-assigns product group to multiple filter types
VERIFIED: POST /api/filters/types/bulk-assign-group - bulk-removes product group from multiple filter types
VERIFIED: POST /api/filters/types/bulk-assign-group - returns 400 when type_ids or product_group missing
VERIFIED: ManageOptionsModal header shows 'Bulk Scope' button when viewing 'All Groups' as admin
VERIFIED: Clicking 'Bulk Scope' enters multi-select mode with checkboxes on spec rows
VERIFIED: Selecting items shows floating action bar with count, group dropdown, Assign and Remove buttons
VERIFIED: 'Select all specs' link visible in bulk mode
VERIFIED: 'Exit Bulk Scope' button clears selection and hides checkboxes
VERIFIED: Group dropdown (data-testid='bulk-scope-group-select') present in action bar
VERIFIED: Assign button (data-testid='bulk-scope-assign-btn') present in action bar
VERIFIED: Remove button (data-testid='bulk-scope-remove-btn') present in action bar
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk Scope feature fully implemented and tested. Backend bulk-assign-group endpoints for both specs and filters work correctly. Frontend ManageOptionsModal shows 'Bulk Scope' button when viewing 'All Groups' as admin. Clicking it enters multi-select mode with checkboxes on spec/filter rows. Selecting items shows floating action bar with group dropdown and Assign/Remove buttons. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_bulk_scope_feature.py
